batch_summary.note: June 2024 sustained cluster: EP-0793 Jun 16 (107 msgs) + EP-0808 Jun 28 (27 msgs) + EP-0809 Jun 29 (37 msgs) + EP-0810 Jun 30 (27 msgs). 198 total hostile msgs in 17 days. Largest cluster volume to date. CYC-001 and CYC-004 both active.

primary_flags.cross_rf_note: B-016 RF-04 flags: ROW-5668-5729 (Sev-2), ROW-5796-5808, ROW-5862. RF-05 signals also present.
